reason: The image depicts a group of people discovering what appears to be an ancient treasure hoard on a rocky coastline, presumably Corsica.  While there are some elements that could potentially align with the 1985 setting (like the general style of clothing), several anachronisms are apparent. The presence of modern, full-zip jackets, and what appears to be modern paper/notebooks, and bags suggest a contemporary context. The overall clothing style, particularly the denim jackets, could be plausible for the era, but the general cut and fit of many garments are modern. The quality of the image, while not definitive, also leans towards modern photography. The presence of modern-style shovels further hurts the validity of the image. Although the general atmosphere is appropriate, the anachronisms are too significant. The scene is otherwise devoid of obvious fantastical elements.
